results.title: Urgent: China to expand green, trade cooperation with Denmark: Chinese FM
results.description: COPENHAGEN, July 2 (Xinhua) -- China is ready to work with Denmark to further expand trade and investment cooperation, launch discussions on a new version of the green joint work program, and deepen cooperation in scientific research and innovation, green shipping and health care, Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi said here on Thursday.

results.title: New $50 Polymarket referral code “OREGON” released for Portugal vs. Croatia odds
results.description: The Polymarket referral code OREGON has been updated for Thursday, activating a $50 bonus in California, Washington State, and Oregon. Claim your funds ahead of the Portugal vs. Croatia knockout stage game.

results.title: A shareholder or personal guarantor has no locus to challenge a completed liquidation auction, and once sale stands confirmed, full consideration is paid, and sale certificate is issued, the auction cannot be set aside on unsubstantiated allegations of fraud or irregularity – A. Joseb Raj Vs. P.R. Raman and Anr. – NCLAT Chennai
